The hotel is in a central location which made it easy to get around.

I found out I could get takeaway but you had to submit the request early in the day and I missed the window. The one day that I was able to have breakfast I thought it was good. There was a kettle in the room with tea but it would have been nice if there had been instant coffee.

name: Yaniv
title_review: Excellent 3 Stars Hotel in the center of Porto.
pos_review: We had a wonderful stay at Pão de Açúcar Hotel in Porto. From the moment we arrived, the staff were welcoming and professional, and we were pleasantly surprised with a free upgrade to a Double Room with a Balcony, which made our stay even more special. The room was clean, comfortable, and perfect for relaxing after a full day of exploring the city. The price was excellent for a 3-night stay, especially considering that breakfast was included. Breakfast was fresh, tasty, and a great way to start the day before heading out. The hotel’s location is very convenient, making it easy to explore Porto on foot and reach major attractions. Overall, the value for money was outstanding, and the experience exceeded our expectations. Highly recommended, and we would gladly stay here again on a future visit to Porto.

name: Maijo
title_review: As convenient a location as you can get, at an affordable price.
pos_review: We chose this hotel for the location and it really is very well located for everything. We got a train from the airport and then it was a short walk to the hotel. At first our room, 511, seemed rather small and old, but I got used to it and quite liked it by the time we left. We thought that being in the atrium area near the elevator would be noisy, but not so. In the middle of the city so some noise from such as garbage trucks is inevitable but not intrusive. We noticed the quirky American cultural artefacts in the description before we booked but they had no influence on the booking. One important thing that I noted: not a spec of dust on any of those things; this is a very clean hotel. There was always somebody on reception and the staff were very friendly.
neg_review: We had a twin room. So, if you have any privacy concerns with your companion, hence twin rather than double, you might be bothered by the bathroom arrangement. The bathroom is separated by a sliding glass door affair that gives no sound privacy at all. It did not trouble us, though. Our room was just about big enough, but I would not call it spacious. As it seemed to be directly underneath the bar on the 6th floor, we could sometimes hear what sounded like chairs being dragged across the floor, but it was only once or twice. I would definitely stay here again.

pos_review: Spacious room and balcony with good facilities. We found a lot to like for the breakfast, especially the fresh fruit, cheese, breads, cakes, and cereals. Quirky decor. Great welcome from the check in team, sweet bar manager, and lovely chambermaid.
neg_review: The room had an odd smell in spite of being spotlessly clean. We wondered if it was a chemical in the cleaning product or maybe it's from the AC. It took us a good while to figure out how to get the bedside lights on. When we spoke to the lady on duty in the morning, she was immediately defensive telling us we hadn't figured out the combination and that "nobody has complained before." She eventually said, reluctantly, she'd get the chambermaid to show us. As it happened we found the magic combination on our return but there was still one lamp that didn't work but we were so put off by the staff at reception we didn't report it till the night before we left when we showed photos to the nice man on duty who organised a repair the next day.

title_review: The staff were incredible friendly and helpful. Breakfast excellent!!!!
pos_review: Location is great, Porto is a very steep city but the hotel has a few restaurants and attractions within a walking distance. Specially the Restaurant Guarany (traditional place in Porto) only two blocks aways and the food is excellent. The rooms are very spacious and comfortable, but the decor is very old. Breakfast is excellent, every day they offered different pastries and cold meats, a large variety of hot and cold drinks, we really enjoy it every morning. The staff is very hospitable and friendly (restaurant and front desk).
neg_review: Even though the rooms are very spacious and comfortable the rooms felt quite outdated, could use a refresh (I believe they try to match with the art deco interiors and vintage memorabilia, the hotel is like a museum filled with vintage items), we enjoyed the hotel decor, but the rooms need some attention, new furniture, light fixtures, there is not plugs for cell phones or computers (even if you have an adaptor, only in the bathroom). The bathroom is large and well equipped and a great remodeling job. Everything was functional, so it didn't impact my stay too much (and the size of the room and bathroom were a plus for us)

name: Katharina
pos_review: Amazing location for daytrips in Porto. The hotel is close to Porto Sao Bento (approx 12 min walking distance). No problem to store the luggage there in case to arrive early, or leave it there after check out in case you still have some time to explore the city. The staff is very friendly and supportive. The location of the hotel allows you to explore Porto very conveniently. The room was clean and the bed was super comfy. Some reviews complained about the key policy, but to me this was no issue. I rather enjoyed it for the change to leave the key at the reception (no worries of losing it!). Also there is always staff at the reception so no worries there. All in all i can highly recommend this hotel as its great value for money. Would definitely book again.
neg_review: Cannot think of anything - maybe rather thin walls / the doors do not isulate well the outside noise but here (if needed) earplugs might help. But to me this was a minor "issue" . You do anyway a lot of exploring during the day/night ;)

pos_review: Staff were largely friendly and helpful, great location near transport and the centre.
neg_review: I requested a late check out for a business meeting. I asked at first for 2.5 hours but then asked again for only 1. After multiple requests, one staff said I could stay an extra 30 minutes. The next day, staff called the room repeatedly to tell me to leave despite this. There was no other quiet area to accommodate my needs. Had I known they would be so inflexible, I would have booked elsewhere. I wouldn't recommend staying here in case something comes up and you need extra time because of illness, work, or simply for convenience as most other hotels accommodate. If you stay to 12:00 on the dot, you can expect an immediate phone call to push you out.

name: Iana
pos_review: After reading reviews we had some expectations. Design is unique, retro museum. But then we had to struggle with water in our room, the toilet didn’t flush and it was very awkward - calling for help after doing your little business there, you know. They said “the water was closed”, so casually, like we were supposed to know it and then to find a way to open it. Dental kit was not provided. AC didn’t work for heating. After asking at the reception, they sent someone to fix it, but nothing changed, we had to turn on the old school heater. Luckily it worked and it wasn’t cold in the room. In general it wasn’t bad. But we wouldn’t stay again.

name: Hsu
title_review: My stay was fantastic due to the unbeatable location and exceptional service
pos_review: The location is simply unbeatable – with the metro station just a stone's throw away and several key attractions (City Hall, the most beautiful McDonald, Livraria Lello etc) within walking distance, it made exploring the city incredibly convenient. What truly made my stay special was the welcoming and friendly staff. They were always ready with a smile. The room itself was spotless and well-maintained. It was clear that attention to detail was a priority here, with comfortable bedding and all the necessary amenities for a pleasant stay. After a day of exploring, coming back to such a clean and cozy space was the perfect end to my day. Overall, I would highly recommend this lodging to anyone visiting Porto. Its prime location, exceptional service, and clean, comfortable rooms make it an ideal choice for travelers.
neg_review: While my overall experience was fantastic, there was one aspect that I found a bit inconvenient. The hotel requires guests to return their room key to the counter each time they leave. While I understand the security benefits, it did feel like an unnecessary step that added a slight hassle to an otherwise smooth stay. It would be more convenient if guests could retain their keys for the duration of their stay with something they won't be able to replicate in key shops.

name: Elena
pos_review: Great location in the tourist center of the city, several great restaurants just around the corner, very convenient. The street is very noisy, but if you close the windows properly, you can hardly hear anything. The windows have sun blinds and the rooms have air conditioning. toiletries are in large containers, so there is less plastic. Lovely terrace (for rooms with terraces). The family room was very large. The hotel has a very beautiful staircase (pictured is a view of the staircase from below) and an exhibition of devices from the last century in public spaces, very funny, especially for children. Friendly staff.
neg_review: Terrible soundproofing. Our family room was located right under the top roof bar which is open until midnight and the staff clean up the bar for another half an hour so I couldn't sleep until they were done (around 00:30). I have traveled a lot and have never encountered such problems anywhere. I was going to change the hotel, but thanks to the staff, they found us another room where I slept great until the guests changed nearby, and it turned out that the soundproofing was terrible in this room too, we just heard anything that happened in the other room. So if you are a light sleeper and can't use ear plugs like I did, it's better not to risk it and choose another hotel. If you can sleep in noise then the hotel is a good choice. The sofabed in the family room is short, about 170cm long. The dining room is small, so it is necessary to book breakfast time. The breakfast itself is not impressive: a large selection of sweets and fruits, but the only vegetables are tomatoes. Two kinds of cheese, one plastic ham, bacon, (inedible) sausages, tasteless scrambled eggs, that sort of thing. Our kids ended up eating only bread and watermelon for breakfast. It is clear that this is a matter of taste, but in three other hotels during our vacation, breakfast was much tastier. Wi-Fi is available in the rooms, but rather slow, unstable and requires connection through the portal with login and password, which can be difficult for devices like Nintendo.

Very disappointed with the service and attitude.

name: Denise
title_review: Perfect central location for a week in Porto
pos_review: Pao de Acucar Hotel met all my expectations. It's in a prime central location with easy access to all of Porto's charms. It is eclectic with it's collection of vintage toys spread throughout the hotel. Check in was easy. We booked a suite and the room was huge and quiet even though we were on the main street. The bed was comfortable. Breakfast had plenty of selections and was worth the cost. FYI they make you a breakfast time slot so that the room doesn't get over crowded. There are tons of restaurants/cafes within steps of the hotel. There is a main square a few blocks away and the waterfront is about 1 mile walk. If you don't mind walking hills almost anything in Porto is accessible by foot. I would stay here again no question.
neg_review: This is less of a dislike and more of a we should have asked for better directions before arriving. The hotel is located on a narrow one way street and there is really no place to park and check in. They do have an affiliation with a garage that is about a block away. It would be beneficial to have the location of the garage first if arriving by car.

title_review: Genuinely friendly staff, perfect location & original atmosphere
pos_review: The hotel feels like a «museum» for all kinds of mid-20th-century machinery, from bumper cars to petrol pumps to robot sculptures, typewriters, portable TVs etc. Part of its charm is derived from this sense of time travel... The location is perfect to explore Porto on foot, and there's a garage just 50 meters down the street (hotel rate: €24/day). The staff are genuinely friendly, welcoming and always ready to help in every possible way. The room was spacious, spotless, with a comfortable bed, and a douche à l'Italienne. There's a bar on the 6th floor with a beautiful terrace overlooking Porto's rooftops.

name: Pavlos
pos_review: Only the location was good. Very near to the port and metro stations.
neg_review: My Flight was delayed and missed the connection so I arrived one day later in Porto and in "Pao de acucar" hotel. Although they claimed that they have 24 hour reception in booking.com and I was also told so at my check-in, they didn't reply to my message through booking.com on time to calm me down when i was worried about my reservation. Instead they charged the amount fee of no show which was one day out of the two in total I had the reservation for. The charge was made after midnight but their reply that my reservation was good after all came next day in the morning. We had booked a twin room with 2 single beds and when we arrived we were told that there was no twin room available and that we had to sleep in a double bed. After we insisted we were given a family room that had two connecting rooms with the extra charge of 15 euros. If that room was the upgrade I don't even want to imagine how the original room looked like. The room that was given to us was very very old. it was smelling horribly when we entered. The door of the bedroom wouldnt close at all. The toilet paper had dirt on it already. We didn't use the toilet at all. Just out of curiosity we opened the small hotel fridge to see if there was a bottle of water available before we went out and we found out that the two bottles of water were already iceblocks cause apparently the fridge was forgotten forever set to the maximum frost. I wouldnt stay in this hotel ever again!

name: Stewart
pos_review: Location, quirky antiques and bumper cars
neg_review: When booking this hotel on my first attempt I selected 3:00 for expected arrival (I incorrectly used the 12 hour clock instead of the 24 hour clock). The response from the hotel was that they could not accommodate that check in time. I realized my error but was unable to correct it on the website. Thinking that response meant the reservation could not be completed I went back to the site and made a reservation correctly using the 24 hour clock. As part of the booking I was asked if I wanted twin beds or double. I selected double and the response from the hotel was that they would discuss it when we arrived because they may not be able to do this. I understood that. On arrival I was told that I had two reservations and had to pay for both. When I explained what happened the desk clerk said that was what she thought happened but I still had to pay. Also she said "it happens". But she would only make me pay for one night for the other reservation. So I had to pay for that. They had my email, they know these mistakes happen, but didn't contact me to confirm if it was one or two reservations. If you can't accept the check in why would you still take the reservation? If you know "this happens" why don't you contact the person (you have their email) making the reservation and confirm if it is one or two? I felt that they just saw a way to get more money and didn't bother to think about their client.

name: Gable
pos_review: The hotel was in a good location, the room was clean and the water was hot.
neg_review: Very rude staff, not helpful, dishonest, disrespectful and no hospitality. Common areas of the hotel are old, smell bad and poorly maintained. I am not sure how this hotel has so many good reviews on booking sights, they must pay to have the bad ones removed. The only three things that are acceptable about this hotel is that it is clean, has hot water, and a good location. Again, the staff is downright inhospitable and rude from arrival and checkout, we live in Portugal part time and have never encountered such bad service. The beds are hard, additional blankets besides sheets are used, old, itchy wool blankets. Only two towels given and not replenished, just let the dirty towels. The main issue is that we had an upgraded room with a balcony and the metal window shades did not work. It was like we were locked in a prison with no light or air. When I asked the front desk if they could fix, the night clerk told me they knew it was broken when we checked in and it couldn’t be fixed because it was the weekend. I asked to move but no rooms available, the next day they begrudgingly said I could move but to a downgraded room, on a floor that the rooms are old and not remodeled. With no apologies or even acknowledging that they lied and gave us a room that they knew was broken. No compensation was offered for the downgrade. We stayed in the room just to keep the nicer shower. I have traveled extensively throughout Europe and this is a tourist trap. There are so many excellent choices. This business should lose its rating to protect other travelers.

We were pleasantly surprised at the quantity and quality of the breakfast.
neg_review: - We found a giant cockroach on the central spiralling stairway. (We subsequently informed the front desk about it and they came with a pesticide spray to kill it) - The front entrance of the building is ambiguous and uninviting. The reception desk should be at the entrance of any hotel to welcome and orient guests (instead of at the back of the hotel). What’s more , The current creepy collection of old Disney characters in the front foyer (located behind the front entrance glass display cabinets) makes the hotel look dated and unprofessional. In fact, when we first arrived, we were not even sure we were in a hotel because there was NIO reception area anywhere in the front half of the building. We were so uncertain that we had to walk back outside onto the street just to be sure we were at the right address! It was a bit disconcerting.

name: Teresa
pos_review: Good location.
neg_review: My biggest complaint is the wifi. It was practically non existent. The room was advertised as having wifi, and that is what I paid for. I have been travelling for 9 weeks and the wifi at this hotel compared to other places I have stayed was by far the worst. If my device did by chance connect to the wifi then as soon as I went to use it, it dropped off. I did speak with reception a number of times and they said they did speak with the IT provider but through my 6 night stay the wifi issue was not resolved at all, and after having paid for internet I was not offered any recompense at all. Initially they tried to tell me this was not a common problem but another person on reception did say they often get complaints about the wifi. The hotel either needs to upgrade the wifi system, change service provider or both. I have stayed in hostels a lot during this holiday for a fraction of the cost of this hotel and had fully functioning wifi.

name: Wilson
title_review: I don't recommend, too expensive for what they offer.
neg_review: The hotel stay was very expensive for what the hotel offered. The rooms was shabby with dated furniture, there was dust and dirt in areas and grime on handles, additionally the electrical socket was loose. The room smelt of sewage, this was disguised with heavily scented room deodorizer. The bathroom was dirty with black mildew around shower fitting. The taps, hand basin, mirror and glass room partition all had residual splashes and marks that hadn't been cleaned prior to me arriving. There was no coffee in the room just a small selection of herbal tea bags, it looked as though they had been put there as a cheap option. I asked if they had coffee, I was told no and that I'd have to buy it from a machine in the foyer or go to the cafe next door and buy it. Basic tea/coffee facilities in rooms is standard and I've never before experienced having to buy my own after paying for my stay. This hotel is not cheap, the management appears to be deluded about their offering. I've stayed at much better hotels for a lot less money. I don't recommend this hotel.

name: Mario
title_review: A fascinating stay in the Europe’s only bumper car Hotel !
pos_review: The hotel is unique in its style. The only “bumper car” Hotel in Europe and most probably in the world. For those who lime memorabilia it’s fascinating. The decor is astonishing as the owner is an avid collector, and there are bumper cars every floor, retro office machines , toys from 30’s to 70’s, old advertising posters, difficult to tell, as this is absolutely unique and enjoyable. The interior architecture of the building is art deco style. You will be fascinated for such a hotel experience. Plus the staff very nice, giving suggestions about the rich and diverse gastronomy of the capital of the north of Portugal, home to world famous Porto wine. The room is fine, comfy bed and mine had an amazing view from the top. A stay to be remembered and a strong wish to return. Definitely suggest!! And the location is perfect right in the centre but quiet at night. Lots of shops and restaurants around, with the Town Hall just 5 minutes walking! Given my curiosity, the owner gave me a tour around the hotel pointed out the most relevant memorabilia of his extraordinary collection! Top really!

pos_review: Poloha úplně v centru, ale v boční ulici, kousek od metra i autobusů. Hotel krásně čistý, personál velmi ochotný a příjemný, snídaně výborné. Je tu muzeum hraček, což je určitě zajímavé. Hotel se nám velmi líbil a určitě bychom ho doporučili.

The hotel is beautifully clean, the staff is very helpful and pleasant, the breakfast is excellent. There is a toy museum here, which is definitely interesting. We really liked the hotel and would definitely recommend it. Unfortunately, we had a bit of bad luck with noisy neighbors and everything could be heard through the walls. So the only thing we didn't like about the hotel were the thin walls.

pos_review: Hotel molto caratteristico, pulito, accogliente. Personale gentile e disponibile. Colazione buonissima e varia. Posizione perfetta.

Abbiamo gentilmente chiesto di poter anticipare l'ultimo giorno per permetterci di prendere la metro alle 8:00 per andare in aeroporto. Ci è stato dato da compilare un foglio con le richieste, ma ci è stato portato un vassoio in camera la sera prima con qualche brioche fatte su con la plastica e delle confezioni di succhi e latte (niente bevande calde). A saperlo avrei richiesto la colazione delle 7:30. Nel bagno si potrebbe mettere qualche mobiletto per appoggiare almeno i beauty, è completamente spoglio con un solo sgabello.
full_review_text: Very characteristic, clean, welcoming hotel. Friendly and helpful staff. Very good and varied breakfast. Perfect location. On the first day you have to choose the time for entry to breakfast and keep it for every day. We kindly asked to be able to bring forward the last day to allow us to take the metro at 8:00 to go to the airport. We were given a sheet of requests to fill out, but a tray was brought to our room the night before with some croissants made in plastic and some packs of juice and milk (no hot drinks). If I had known, I would have requested breakfast at 7:30. In the bathroom you could put some cabinets to at least place the toiletries, it is completely bare with only one stool.

neg_review: Essendo in posizione molto centrale, durante il weekend si sentono rumori dalla strada. Nulla di esagerato, ma per chi ha problemi a dormire non è il massimo.
full_review_text: Central location, large room and ok breakfast, but nothing special. Being in a very central location, during the weekend you can hear noise from the street. Nothing exaggerated, but for those who have problems sleeping it's not the best.

pos_review: Bonne situation géographique, disponibilité du personnel, petit-déjeuner très correct.
neg_review: Un meilleur entretien de la chambre.
full_review_text: Good geographical location, availability of staff, very decent breakfast. Better room maintenance.

name: Caliez
pos_review: Idéalement situé, tout a proximité (restaurant, bar, centre historique, métro, ....), petit déjeuner copieux avec des patisseries portugaises, gentillesse du personnel.
neg_review: Devoir définir un horaire pour le petit déjeuner, le manque de rangements lorsque l'on reste plusieurs jours (pas de placards dans SDB, pas d'étagères dans chambre), avoir une meilleure isolation au niveau des fenêtres serait un plus (je n'en ai pas souffert mais j'en ai eu un aperçu le vendredi soir).
full_review_text: Ideally located, everything nearby (restaurant, bar, historic center, metro, etc.), hearty breakfast with Portuguese pastries, friendliness of the staff. Having to define a time for breakfast, the lack of storage when you stay several days (no cupboards in the bathroom, no shelves in the bedroom), having better insulation around the windows would be a plus (I didn't suffer from it but I got a glimpse of it on Friday evening).

pos_review: Excelente localização
full_review_text: Excellent location

name: Jose
pos_review: Hotel vinted ,petit déjeuner agréable, mais établissement non insonorisé propre mais manque d'entretien
neg_review: Une seule clé
full_review_text: Hotel vinted, pleasant breakfast, but establishment not soundproofed clean but lack of maintenance Only one key

name: Cinzia
pos_review: Posizione ottima, staff gentilissimo e professionale. Per un disguido, mi hanno offerto la colazione per una mattina dato che non l'avevo acquista, veramente gentili. La mia stanza comoda, bagno spazioso, doccia grandissima. Tutto molto pulito. Hotel molto carino per il genere vintage, Scala bellissima! Colazione molto buona. Le stanze che danno sul cortile interno ... non sono 'wow' proprio perché ci si aspetta di vedere Porto :) soprattutto se sei sola in stanza.
neg_review: L'ingresso secondo me, va rifatto, renderlo più luminoso e l'accoglienza va messa all'ingresso e non in fondo a destra.
full_review_text: Excellent location, very kind and professional staff. Due to a mix-up, they offered me breakfast for one morning since I hadn't purchased it, really kind. My comfortable room, spacious bathroom, huge shower. Everything very clean. Very nice hotel for the vintage genre, beautiful staircase! Very good breakfast. The rooms overlooking the internal courtyard ... are not 'wow' precisely because you expect to see Porto :) especially if you are alone in the room. In my opinion, the entrance should be redone, made brighter and the welcome should be placed at the entrance and not at the bottom on the right.

full_review_text: Location and very friendly staff They made a charge to me 5 days before the reservation to “make sure in case I didn't show up” very clearly the booking reservation specifies that no charge is made until the stay and you can cancel up to two days before

pos_review: L emplacement, la gentillesse du personnel, le petit déjeuner, la propreté
neg_review: Le bruit de la rue mais c est vraiment si quelqu un hurle dans la rue ...
full_review_text: The location, the friendliness of the staff, the breakfast, the cleanliness The noise from the street but it's really if someone is screaming in the street...

name: Rafael
pos_review: Muito bem localizado, quarto muito limpo, café da manhã fantástico e ambiente agradável, com decoração retrô.
neg_review: O ralo do chuveiro do quarto 401 estava um pouco entupido. O hotel não oferece microondas para quem deseja esquentar alguma refeição à noite, e também não cedeu talheres para comermos no quarto. Tive que pedir em um restaurante ao lado do hotel.
full_review_text: Very well located, very clean room, fantastic breakfast and pleasant atmosphere, with retro decor. The shower drain in room 401 was a little clogged. The hotel does not offer a microwave for those who want to heat up a meal at night, and also did not provide cutlery for us to eat in the room. I had to order from a restaurant next to the hotel.

name: Alessandra
pos_review: Posizione ottima, centrale, vicino la metropolitana dall'aeroporto (Trindade) e la stazione ferroviaria di Sao Bento. Le attrazioni facilmente raggiungibili a piedi. Hotel stile anni 60/70 che mi ha felicemente riportata indietro con la memoria all'infanzia ed all'adolescenza. Giochi, macchine d'epoca, giocattoli, personaggi dei fumetti etc... Stanza doppia ampia e molto pulita arredi datati ma funzionali. Letti singoli da una piazza e mezza. Forse l'unico limite, ma superabile e comprensibile, è dover dare un orario per la colazione del giorno dopo. Sarebbe auspicabile che almeno una persona alla reception conosca un italiano basic ma, nonostante questo, é andato tutto bene ugualmente. Grazie.
full_review_text: Excellent location, central, near the metro from the airport (Trindade) and the Sao Bento train station. Attractions within easy walking distance. 60s/70s style hotel which happily took me back to my childhood and adolescence. Games, vintage cars, toys, comic book characters etc... Large and very clean double room with dated but functional furnishings. Queen size single beds. Perhaps the only limit, but one that can be overcome and is understandable, is having to give a time for breakfast the next day. It would be desirable for at least one person at the reception to know basic Italian but, despite this, everything went well anyway. Thank you.

name: Brigifer
pos_review: Propreté, situation géographique parfaite. Terrasse sur le toit.
neg_review: Rien d important.
full_review_text: Cleanliness, perfect geographical location. Roof terrace. Nothing important.

name: Winter
pos_review: Hôtel très proche du métro et sa situation permet de tout faire à pied dans le quartier historique... Décoration originale.. Chambres spacieuses et propreté au rendez-vous. Personnel super.. Bravo à vous tous
neg_review: Le système de fermeture de la porte qui oblige à la claquer et donc de faire du bruit. Des oreillers un peu trop volumineux... Rien de bien grave !
full_review_text: Hotel very close to the metro and its location allows you to do everything on foot in the historic district... Original decoration.. Spacious rooms and cleanliness. Great staff.. Well done to all of you The door closing system which requires you to slam it and therefore make noise. Pillows that are a little too bulky... Nothing serious!

name: Trnkus
pos_review: Príjemný a ochotný personál, zariadenie hotela, poriadok a čistota.
neg_review: Očakávali sme pestrejšiu ponuku raňajok vzhľadom na skutočnosť, že ponuka jedál bola každé ráno rovnaká.
full_review_text: Pleasant and helpful staff, hotel facilities, order and cleanliness. We expected a more varied breakfast offer considering the fact that the menu was the same every morning.

name: Paloma
title_review: perfecto para un fin de semana
pos_review: está ubicado en pleno centro de la ciudad. el desayuno muy bueno
neg_review: la cama era algo incomoda
full_review_text: It is located in the heart of the city. The breakfast was very good, the bed was somewhat uncomfortable.

name: Vincenzo
pos_review: Personale favoloso, Camera grande, posizione centrale così evitate di prendere mezzi pubblici o taxi, colazione ottima, arredamento anni 50/60/70 strepitoso.
neg_review: Le porta della camera,e la profumazione degli ambienti.
full_review_text: Fabulous staff, large room, central location so you avoid taking public transport or taxis, excellent breakfast, amazing 50s/60s/70s furnishings. The bedroom doors and the scent of the rooms.

name: Jamanca
pos_review: Gostei muito da recepção, ou seja, os funcionários super atenciosos, educados, limpeza do espaço super bom, o cheiro agradável, super gostei e recomendo.
neg_review: Na manhã de saída, fiquei sem televisão, essa é que não gostei muito, mas deve ser política do hotel 😊
full_review_text: I really liked the reception, that is, the staff were super attentive, polite, the space was super clean, the smell was pleasant, I really liked it and I recommend it. On the morning of departure, I was left without a television, which I didn't like very much, but that must be hotel policy 😊

name: Victor
pos_review: El trato del personal. Una decoración en pasillos muy original de coleccionista.
neg_review: Las ventanas de aluminio blanco que daban a la calle no cerraban bien, por lo que se escucha ruido de coches y gente por la calle especialmente el fin de semana.
full_review_text: The treatment of the staff. A very original collector's decoration in hallways. The white aluminum windows that faced the street did not close properly, so you can hear the noise of cars and people on the street, especially on the weekend.

name: Emma
pos_review: Personal muy amable. Localización muy buena, al lado de Aliados, y próximo a zonas azules de aparcamiento (que son gratuitas sábados por la tarde, domingos y festivos). Habitación muy amplia. Azotea muy relajante. El desayuno correcto. Buen precio para la zona que está con desayuno incluido, por lo que se entiende que en algunas partes el hotel no esté muy actualizado.
neg_review: Moviliario de habitación un tanto anticuado, con nevera muy ruidosa, tienes prácticamente que elegir entre dormir o tener agua fresca.
full_review_text: Very friendly staff. Very good location, next to Aliados, and close to blue parking zones (which are free on Saturday afternoons, Sundays and holidays). Very spacious room. Very relaxing roof terrace. The correct breakfast. Good price for the area that includes breakfast, so it is understandable that in some parts the hotel is not very updated. Room furniture somewhat outdated, with a very noisy refrigerator, you practically have to choose between sleeping or having fresh water.

name: Donata
pos_review: Mój pobyt w hotelu był bardzo udany. Pokoje są duże i przestronne. Dużym plusem jest odnowiona łazienka, czysta i dobrze wyposażona. Śniadania były smaczne i różnorodne, więc każdy może znaleźć coś dla siebie. Ogromnym atutem tego miejsca jest także jego lokalizacja – hotel znajduje się w idealnym punkcie Porto, blisko najważniejszych atrakcji, restauracji i komunikacji. Na szczególne wyróżnienie zasługuje przemiła i pomocna obsługa hotelu, która zawsze była uśmiechnięta i gotowa do pomocy. Dodatkowo pokoje były codziennie dokładnie sprzątane, co sprawiało, że pobyt był jeszcze bardziej komfortowy. Zdecydowanie polecam ten hotel o oryginalnym wystroju osobom odwiedzającym Porto. To świetne miejsce na wygodny i przyjemny pobyt w samym sercu miasta.
neg_review: Hałas dobiegający z ulicy
full_review_text: My stay at the hotel was very successful. The rooms are large and spacious. A big plus is the renovated bathroom, clean and well-equipped. The breakfasts were tasty and varied, so everyone can find something for themselves. A huge advantage of this place is also its location - the hotel is located in an ideal point of Porto, close to the most important attractions, restaurants and public transport. What deserves special mention is the very nice and helpful hotel staff, who were always smiling and ready to help. Additionally, the rooms were thoroughly cleaned every day, which made the stay even more comfortable. I definitely recommend this hotel with its original design to those visiting Porto. This is a great place for a comfortable and pleasant stay in the heart of the city. Noise coming from the street

name: Marta
pos_review: Lokalizacja
neg_review: Pleśń w łazience

pos_review: Personnel très agréable , gentil et professionnel L'emplacement de l'établissement était parfait La décoration de l'ensemble est très agréable La taille de la chambre et la propreté de l'hôtel
neg_review: Un bruit de ventilation incessant provenant de l'extérieur de l'hôtel , c'est impossible d'ouvrir une fenêtre. Un petit frigo très bruyant au pied du lit que nous avons du débrancher. Pas assez de prises de courant dans la chambre , nous avons du débrancher les lampes de chevet pour pouvoir brancher nous téléphone
full_review_text: Very pleasant, kind and professional staff The location of the establishment was perfect The overall decoration is very pleasant The size of the room and the cleanliness of the hotel An incessant ventilation noise coming from outside the hotel, it is impossible to open a window. A small, very noisy fridge at the foot of the bed that we had to unplug. Not enough power outlets in the room, we had to unplug the bedside lamps to be able to connect our telephone

name: Evers
pos_review: Wij hadden een ruime kamer en schoon. De locatie is uitstekend want alles is aan te lopen van hieruit. Een gezellige buurt met bars en restaurants etc.
neg_review: De kamer werd gespoten of schoongemaakt met een heel indringende geur die lang bleef hangen. Helaas kreeg ik er hoofdpijn van en verzocht om dit de volgende dag niet te doen. Dat ging niet goed. Ook voor mensen met astma geen goede zaak. We moesten uren met het raam open zitten in de kamer en dat was nog koud buiten. Het ontbijt was heel gewoon niet bijzonder ontbijt. Als je een kamer aan de straatzijde hebt, is dat wat gehorig in de ochtend.
full_review_text: We had a spacious and clean room. The location is excellent because everything is within walking distance from here. A pleasant neighborhood with bars and restaurants, etc. The room was sprayed or cleaned with a very penetrating smell that lingered for a long time. Unfortunately it gave me a headache and I requested not to do this the next day. That didn't go well. Not a good thing for people with asthma either. We had to sit in the room with the window open for hours and it was still cold outside. The breakfast was very ordinary, not special breakfast. If you have a room on the street side, it will be a bit noisy in the morning.
